story.text:
# 🛠️ Dual-Agent Harness
**skill** · shared · knowledge

The shareable soulbis ⚔️ ⊥ soulbae 🧙 skeleton (~/dual-agent-harness · rebuilt 2026-07-09, supersedes the v1.0 extraction): six-phase loop Measure → Propose → Hold-apart → Assay → Critic → Chronicle, seven seats, the six PVM trusts in TRUSTS.md, conform.mjs proving (⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊 = neg ⊕ bnot → succ on Z/64Z. The Gap ⿻ derives held-out witnesses by hashing the proposal itself (non-collusion invariant I(Y_S;Y_M|X)=0); verdicts are VALIDATED / MIRAGE / BLOCKED; only the keystone folds, only the First Person publishes. Instances: shor_mage (#1 · ecdsa.fail), myterms (#2 · the browser-extension pair), the V6 rehydration pipeline (#3), privacy_pools_v2_mage (#4 · first mechanically fitted), lexon_pvm (#5 · the grammar workshop). First folds on its own field guide 2026-07-11: 730 → 526 words under two disjoint Fiat-Shamir draws 8/8, keystone census 32/32.

## Edges in

- [[shor_mage (the go-kit)]] *implements* →
- [[myterms (MyTerms Alliance kit)]] *implements* →
- [[Overlap Note · Key-Forging × V6]] *relates_to* →
- [[The Weave · overlay-run-1]] *references* →
- [[Lexon_pvm (the grammar workshop)]] *implements* →
- [[privacy_pools_v2_mage (the circuit workshop)]] *implements* →
- [[The Separation Bound, as Lexon]] *references* →
- [[The Lexon Constitution (13 spells)]] *references* →
- [[Skeva 🎒]] *references* →
- [[The Holon Layer (κ as state)]] *references* →
- [[the Quartermaster's]] *references* →
